meta.title: StereoBoogie — Street Wave Artist
meta.description: StereoBoogie — multidisciplinary artist, art director of Street Wave. Paintings, objects, digital art.

bio.text: StereoBoogie is a multidisciplinary artist working at the intersection of painting, digital art, and product design. He creates paintings, sculptures, custom objects, and installations. At the core of his practice is an exploration of identity in the digital age.

statement.title: Between the screen and the skin
paragraphs: My work is an exploration of what happens to a person when they exist simultaneously in physical and digital space. The mask is not a way to hide a face — it's a way to reveal what lies beneath: anxiety, fragmentation, multiplicity.
Six eyes are not a mutation. It's a state of constant observation: we look at screens, screens look at us. Cursors, interfaces, pixels — they've become part of our anatomy, not just tools.

I don't separate digital and analog. Canvas and screen are one surface. Brush and stylus are one instrument. What matters is only what remains after — an image, a feeling, a question without an answer.

items.title: The Mask
items.desc: Identity as construct. What we show — and what we conceal.

items.title: Six Eyes
items.desc: Hyperawareness. A state of constant observation and being observed.

items.title: Fragmented Body
items.desc: A person split between realities — physical and digital.

items.title: Interfaces & Cursors
items.desc: Digital artifacts as part of the bodily experience.

items.title: Pixel as Anatomy
items.desc: Screen resolution becomes the resolution of the body.

items.title: Backspace Tourist
items.desc: A series about digital nomadism and the erasure of boundaries between real and virtual. Characters travel through spaces that are impossible to define — is it an interface? A city? A dream? Each work is an attempt to hit backspace on one's own identity.

items.title: Masked Figures
items.desc: Masked figures are not characters — they are states. Anxiety, observation, multiplicity. The mask here doesn't conceal — it reveals. The series explores how we construct ourselves for the outside gaze and what remains when the camera is off.

role.title: Art Director of Street Wave
role.text: StereoBoogie is the lead artist and art director of Street Wave. He oversees the visual quality of all projects, curates guest artists, and develops concepts for brand collaborations. Every custom object at Street Wave passes through his creative vision.

cta.title: Open to collaboration
cta.subtitle: Private commissions, collaborations, exhibitions, brand projects.
